verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Release restores prior state; Verified OS normalcy; No residue; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.restore_evidence: release() restores and verifies the recorded prior state (restored:true on the real port).
gate_result.normalcy_evidence: Independently verified: immediately after release the little brother binds the same port itself — the OS returns to normal, not merely to a claimed state.
gate_result.residue_evidence: After releasing the spawned worker and the lease dir, the pid file and lease directory are gone and the plane holds zero resources.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Real port re-bind by an independent server, real process kill, real dir removal.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the control plane absent (8/8 files failing) at the lane red commit, green at HEAD

proof_summary: ARCHBP-104 is complete: release restores the recorded prior host state with independent OS-normalcy verification (the host re-binds the released port itself) and zero residue — no leftover processes, files, or holds.
